query:
SELECT c.id, c.title, COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) as modulos, COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as aulas
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN modules m ON c.id = m.course_id
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON m.id = l.module_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute SELECT c.id, c.title, COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) as modulos, COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as aulas
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN modules m ON c.id = m.course_id
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON m.id = l.module_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title;
